title: tephrosia karkarensis
intro: Tephrosia karkarensis, also known as Karkare plant, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions such as fever, inflammation, and respiratory problems. The plant is valued for its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including relieving coughs, colds, and other respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia karkarensis include infusions, decoctions, and powder extracts, which are often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine systems.
